The '''''Dwarf Star''-class freighter''' was a common freight cruiser during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
150 meters in length, the ''Dwarf Star''-class was designed and produced by [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] and could transport up to 1,500 metric tons of cargo with a crew of 400. A curved ship that featured a bulged bow that tapered until near the stern where it expanded for the engine housing, the standard ship was armed with nine [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannons]] along the middle of the ship and a single [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projector.

The vessel class was popular amongst short-haul traders or smugglers for its high meter to cargo capacity ratio and its stock weaponry. Despite its weaponry, shields aboard the ''Dwarf Star''-class could be brought down by eight [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] impacts, making its defenses useful against light raids but worthless against a military strike.

==Appearances==
